title: Fire Evacuation Procedure
scenario: Create a fire evacuation procedure for a high-rise office building. The procedure should include a description of the emergency alarm system, instructions for evacuating the building, and a list of emergency exits. The procedure should be written in a concise and easy-to-follow format, using clear headings and bullet points. The procedure should be no more than 150 words and assume a building occupancy of 500 people.
constraints: Must be no more than 150 words
Must use clear headings and bullet points

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the procedure adheres to the word count and formatting constraints.
Check if the procedure is written in a clear and concise manner, using simple language.
Check if the procedure includes accurate and relevant information about the emergency alarm system, evacuation instructions, and emergency exits.
